calendar_tier: TIER 3 — Regular offseason news cycle. NFL league meetings wrapped up Tuesday, some draft news, but no major calendar events happening.

tweet_volume_check.dominant_topic: Mixed day — no single topic dominates. NFL draft content vs NBA games vs Nacua situation. NFL gets hierarchy advantage.

editorial_reasoning.lead_choice: Puka Nacua rehab story — shocking development for 2024 OROY, legal allegations, multiple Schefter tweets with details. Has the most juice and surprise factor.

stories_considered_and_demoted.reason: Interesting but just a meeting. No commitment, no deal. Promote to medium story.
Recurring topic from meetings. No new developments. Timeline item.

stories_considered_and_demoted.story: Todd Monken missed photo for haircut
stories_considered_and_demoted.reason: Funny but thin. Perfect Timeline tweet.

stories_promoted.reason: Expected #1 pick throwing perfect passes to all 32 teams. Draft season heating up. Strong medium story.
39 points, oldest player ever with those numbers on 0 TOV. StatMuse has the receipts.

editorial_reasoning.tweet_gaps: Need more reaction tweets for most stories — lots of news-breaker content but lighter on comedy/memes today.

stories.headline: Puka Nacua Checks Into Rehab Amid Legal Troubles
hooks: 2024 OROY in rehab before allegations broke

sub_angles.statistically_interesting: Nacua broke multiple rookie receiving records in 2024
sub_angles.who_else_affected: Rams offense already dealt with Kupp injuries, now Nacua issues
sub_angles.cross_connection: Young NFL star following troubled path of other high-profile athletes
sub_angles.where_it_goes: Criminal case pending, potential suspension, Rams' 2026 season in jeopardy

research.context: Antisemitic statement allegation, biting incident, substantial time in rehab
research.connections: Pattern of young NFL stars facing legal troubles

blocks.hint: Hook — Rams WR Puka Nacua, the 2024 Offensive Rookie of the Year, has checked into rehab. Frame as shocking fall from rookie hero to legal trouble in one offseason.

Timeline twist — his attorney says Nacua was in rehab BEFORE any allegations broke. 'Substantial period of time' before the antisemitic statement and biting allegations surfaced. Frame as either good planning or bad coincidence.

blocks.context: Nacua was already in rehab before allegations
blocks.avoid: Do NOT search 'football' — search 'confused timeline conspiracy'

blocks.hint: Kicker — From OROY breaking rookie records to legal allegations in one year. The Rams went from having Cooper Kupp injury issues to this. Sometimes the NFL humbles you fast.

stories.headline: OBJ-Giants Reunion Talks at NFL Meetings

sub_angles.statistically_interesting: OBJ's Giants career: 2014-2018, trade was controversial
sub_angles.running_joke: OBJ always finds a way back into headlines
sub_angles.who_else_affected: Giants WR room, other free agent WRs still available
sub_angles.where_it_goes: Giants need veteran presence, OBJ needs to prove he's still got it

research.context: Meeting with Harbaugh at league meetings, exploring reunion
research.connections: Full circle moment if it happens

blocks.hint: Hook — OBJ showed up to the NFL meetings and sat down with Giants coach John Harbaugh about a return. Eight years after the messy breakup, they're talking reunion.
Circle of life — OBJ was drafted by the Giants, became a star, got traded in drama, bounced around the league, and now might come home. Frame as 'everything comes full circle in the NFL.'

blocks.avoid: Do NOT search 'Giants' — search 'prodigal son returns home'

stories.headline: Fernando Mendoza's Perfect Pro Day Show
hooks: Expected #1 pick hasn't missed a throw

sub_angles.statistically_interesting: 56 passes, zero misses reported at time of tweet
sub_angles.who_else_affected: Other QB prospects, Raiders with #1 pick
sub_angles.where_it_goes: Cementing his status as QB1 in the draft

research.context: Pro day at Indiana with all 32 teams present

blocks.hint: Hook — Fernando Mendoza put on a clinic at his pro day today. The expected #1 pick was reportedly perfect through 56 passes with all 32 teams watching. Frame as 'this is how you lock up being the first pick.'

blocks.avoid: Do NOT search 'quarterback' — search 'chef's kiss perfection'

blocks.hint: Kicker — The Raiders have the #1 pick and just watched their future franchise QB throw 56 straight dimes. Sometimes the draft process actually works exactly as planned.

stories.headline: Paul George Makes History at 37
hooks: Oldest player ever with those numbers

sub_angles.statistically_interesting: First player in NBA history 37+ with 39/5/6/3 on 0 TOV
sub_angles.who_else_affected: Sixers playoff push, other aging stars
sub_angles.where_it_goes: Proving he's still elite despite age concerns

research.context: Part of strong return from injury, Sixers 3-1 since return

blocks.hint: Paul George went nuclear against Washington: 39 points, 6 assists, 3 steals, ZERO turnovers. At 37, he's the oldest player in NBA history to put up those numbers without a single turnover.

blocks.avoid: Do NOT search 'basketball' — search 'fine wine gets better with age'

Giannis celebrating his brother's first NBA points

closer.hook: Jerry O'Connell tried to prank PMT by impersonating Geno Smith

blocks.hint: Jerry O'Connell wanted to prank call PMT as Geno Smith for April Fools but they told the hosts about it because they just wanted to hear Jerry try to do a Geno Smith impression. Peak Jerry O energy.

blocks.why: Jerry O'Connell Geno Smith impression explanation
